narrative_beat: Wide symmetric diptych: left Isaiah in ochre robe with parchment, right Orwell in 40s suit with typewriter, vertical gold light seam between, giant hourglass P&B behind

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide symmetric diptych composition with Isaiah the prophet on the left and George Orwell on the right facing each other
subject.focal_point: the narrow vertical seam of golden divine light between the two figures
subject.secondary: Left: ancient prophet in crimson and ochre robes holding scroll. Right: gaunt man in 1940s brown suit holding typewriter. Behind both, a gigantic desaturated hourglass.

composition.foreground: both figures in rich crimson and ochre tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white giant hourglass filling the background

lighting.key_light: vertical gold light down the center seam
lighting.fill_light: cold ambient blue fill on outer edges

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: two millennia collapse into the same warning

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
